placement: inside /operator/command-center within the existing ShopiFixer fulfillment workbench panel

smallest_ui_control.type: single compact inline form with one submit control
smallest_ui_control.label: Capture Before Evidence
smallest_ui_control.behavior: expands or reveals a short evidence form inside the existing workbench card; no new route, modal can be used only if the inline form cannot fit

system_prefills: store from active merchant lifecycle record

invoke_path.ui: OperatorHomeV1.tsx renders the control and submits the form
invoke_path.server_side: page.tsx or a small operator helper invokes write_before_evidence_v1.mjs

success_state.proof: the proof-run markdown exists and shows the submitted evidence
success_state.local_progress: mark the Before Evidence step complete in the fulfillment workbench UI only

lifecycle_progression_without_truth_writ.rule: do not update merchant_lifecycle_registry_v1.json or shopifixer_fulfillment_truth_v1.json yet
lifecycle_progression_without_truth_writ.status_source: presence of the updated before_evidence.md artifact and the writer success response

readiness_impact.after_implementation: first operator-triggered fulfillment step becomes executable from /operator/command-center
readiness_impact.governance_effect: improves execution readiness without changing governed truth

answer.exact_ui_control: A single compact inline form with one submit control labeled Capture Before Evidence, embedded in the existing fulfillment workbench card.
expected_operator_flow: Fill affected page or artifact, issue, why it matters, screenshot path/link, and notes
Confirm the before_evidence.md artifact was rewritten and the local workbench step is marked complete
answer.readiness_impact: Improves ShopiFixer execution readiness by turning the first proof-run step into an operator-triggered workflow while leaving lifecycle truth unchanged.
